notes: HKEX stock 0327. hkex_manual bootstrap: annual PDFs (SRC_001-003) ported from 3.0 reference set. H1 interim PDFs (SRC_004-006) present in filings/ but NOT canonized in expected.json — H1 extractor support is pending (future BL). HkexFetcher implemented (BL-083). HKFRS is IFRS-equivalent (applied by PwC-audited entity). All monetary fields in HK$'000. No interest-bearing borrowings (confirmed 2022-2025). EBITDA explicitly stated in segment note each period. Weighted-average basic shares from Note 12. D&A additive: PPE depreciation + ROU depreciation + intangible amortisation (Note 8).
